version_description: These chords can be heard played on an electric guitar in the song. They sound better than the current tabs.

versions.version_description: This is a pretty easy version of the song (It sounds a little bit better without the capo).
These chords can be heard played on an electric guitar in the song. They sound better than the current tabs.
This version contains the specific voices of the chords played in the song. Chord tabs are included below.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
